name: 120 MG Capsules USP
about: 120 MG Capsules USP is a type of general medicine that is manufactured in India. These capsules contain 120 MG of medicine in solid form and come in the form of tablets. It is recommended to store these capsules in a dry place to maintain their effectiveness. These capsules are suitable for individuals who require a dosage of 120 MG for various medical conditions.
